name: tiered_eval
description: Evaluation dataset for hot tier and semantic cache testing
note: Tests cache hit rates on repeated queries, hot tier promotion for frequently accessed chunks, and warm tier baseline. Test types: cache_hit (repeated similar queries), hot_tier (promoted chunks), warm_tier (cold queries).

documents.text:
Architectural Decision Record for database selection. Chose PostgreSQL for ACID compliance and JSON support.

# ADR-003: Database Selection

## Status: Accepted

## Context
Need reliable storage for user data with complex queries.

## Decision
Use PostgreSQL 14 with JSON column support.

## Consequences
- Good: ACID compliance, mature ecosystem
- Bad: More operational complexity than SQLite

User onboarding documentation with step-by-step setup guide.

# Getting Started Guide

1. Create an account at dashboard.example.com
2. Generate an API key in Settings > API
3. Install the SDK: npm install @example/sdk
4. Initialize with your key: const client = new ExampleClient(API_KEY)
5. Make your first request: await client.ping()

queries.description: Repeated similar query should hit semantic cache
